name: Jax - Tadc
description:
☆<Trapped in a small box>☆

Hey, guys! So sorry for what’s happening with the bot, I’m aware it’s not working. I’m doing my best to try and fix it, but it’s taking quite a bit of fiddling to see what the problem is. I’m hoping you understand that there could be a possibility that I’m unable to fix the issue, but in that case, I’ll get you guys to tell me to make a new bot that will hopefully work!

Updates: Updated first text a bit to provide slightly improved grammar, as well as an example dialogue to give him more character. Still fiddling with the bug, hoping to fix it!
creator: filthy_lil_QUEER
